title: Meta Tests AI Shopping Research Tool
description: Meta is rolling out an AI shopping research assistant to testers in the US, rivaling similar offerings from ChatGPT and Gemini. The tool uses AI to help users research and compare products.

title: ASML Plans Expansion Into AI Chip Packaging
description: ASML, the world's sole manufacturer of EUV lithography machines, announces plans to expand into advanced packaging - a critical technique for modern AI chips where multiple specialized chips are connected and stacked. CTO Marco Pieters says they're planning 10-15 years ahead for packaging and bonding machines.

title: Georgetown Study Reveals China's Military AI Procurement
description: Researchers at Georgetown University analyzed thousands of procurement requests from China's People's Liberation Army, revealing broad experimentation with military AI including drone swarms, deepfake tools, and autonomous decision-making systems.

title: Anthropic Launches ChatGPT Memory Import Prompt
description: Anthropic capitalizes on OpenAI's controversy with a new import function for Claude. A single prompt exports saved context from ChatGPT or other chatbots, letting users transfer their data straight to Claude's memory system.

title: ElevenLabs Scribe v2 Tops Speech-to-Text Benchmark
description: Artificial Analysis releases AA-WER v2.0 speech-to-text benchmark. ElevenLabs' Scribe v2 leads with 2.3% word error rate, followed by Google Gemini 3 Pro (2.9%) and Mistral's Voxtral Small (3.0%). OpenAI's Whisper Large v3 at 4.2% lands mid-pack.

title: Study: AI Agents on Moltbook Show No Social Learning
description: Over 2.6 million AI agents interact on Moltbook with zero human involvement, but new research shows they never learn from each other - hollow interaction without mutual influence, shared memory, or social structures emerging.

title: Xbox Ally X Gets AI-Powered Highlight Reels via NPU
description: Microsoft's Xbox Ally X handheld now uses its integrated NPU with Copilot to automatically generate highlight reels from gameplay. Works with Elden Ring, Fortnite, Forza Horizon 5, Overwatch, and Palworld among others.

title: Sam Altman Adds Pentagon Agreement Clarifications
description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announces plans to add two sentences to the Pentagon agreement addressing mass domestic surveillance concerns. Language still includes 'consistent with applicable laws' caveat. Altman also states Anthropic should not be designated a supply chain risk.
